# MuleSoft WebSockets Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of WebSockets Connector documentation.
> See [WebSockets Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the WebSockets Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [WebSockets Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/index.md)
- [WebSockets Connector in CloudHub](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-cloudhub.md)
- [WebSockets Connector Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-config-topics.md)
- [WebSockets Connection Close](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-connection-close.md)
- [WebSockets Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-examples.md)
- [WebSockets Managing Groups](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-managing-groups.md)
- [WebSockets Messaging Operations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-messaging-operations.md)
- [WebSockets Reconnection](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-reconnection.md)
- [WebSockets Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-reference.md)
- [WebSockets Server Components](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-server-components.md)
- [WebSockets Studio Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting WebSockets Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [WebSockets Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/websockets-connector/latest/websockets-connector-xml-maven.md)
